items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not confirm the expected outcome of the persona scenario 'Prorated upgrade mid-cycle'. While the step outlines a simulation and validation process, there are no specific results or traces captured that demonstrate whether the scenario behavior was confirmed or if a failure report was generated. The lack of concrete evidence to support the expected result leads to an inconclusive status.
